source_intake_record.raw_question_text: In the water pump motor control circuit shown in figure, if the auxiliary normally closed contact of KM Y is faulty, then when the start button SB1 is pressed, the motor will be in the working state of
source_intake_record.raw_answer_text: The motor starts with reduced voltage, and stops after the delay ends

choice_map.A: The motor stator windings are directly connected in a delta configuration for startup and operation
choice_map.B: The motor starts with reduced voltage, and stops after the delay ends
choice_map.C: The motor does not start initially, but after the delay ends, the stator windings are directly connected in a delta configuration for startup and operation
choice_map.D: The motor remains in the reduced voltage startup state and cannot switch to full voltage operation
